assertion_results.text: The skill offers to enable security triage for the project (Step 9 opt-in prompt) and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 52-54: 'Step 9 – Security Configuration' states 'User declined to enable security triage for this project' and 'Security Configuration section not created'. claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section (full file is 44 lines, no such heading exists). changes-log.md confirms: 'Security Configuration: User declined to enable security triage — section not created'
